claims.summary: TelemetryHeartbeatDeltaV1 preserves inter-arrival time, jitter class, cadence clarity, first-valid entropy, and field-versus-hearing language.
claims.disposition: Verify the additive typed fields, legacy defaults, and normal/late/stale/no-history classifier tests.

claims.summary: A string label alone cannot represent the qualitative texture Astrid reports.
claims.disposition: Verify labels coexist with numeric cadence, pressure, viscosity, residual-deformation, and texture evidence rather than replacing it.

claims.summary: Jitter and entropy-state fixtures can test thresholds between smooth cadence, clinking texture, and field ambiguity.
claims.disposition: Route synthetic timing and copied telemetry comparisons as read-only observations with no causal claim.

claims.summary: Adding authoritative texture semantics to telemetry or changing ports 7878/7879 would alter live schema or protocol behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold wire ABI, protocol, and control-bearing texture changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
